courseTitle: Applied Game Mathematics, Technical Art, and Production Pipelines
title: High-Volume Object Pool Game
genericDescription: Optimize memory and frame time; use object pooling or equivalent reuse patterns; profile high-volume runtime systems.
specificDescription: Build a bullet-hell, particle, crowd, falling-sand, swarm, loot, or effects-heavy game with hundreds or thousands of active elements. Submit before/after profiling or frame-time evidence.
gradingRubric: 30 pts optimization architecture; 20 pts frame stability; 20 pts preserved gameplay clarity; 15 pts profiling evidence; 15 pts code organization.
